_comment: pre-pipeline-refresh: blocks pipeline-refresh commands when OneDrive is not running or network is unreachable.

hooks.command: bash -c 'CMD="$CLAUDE_TOOL_ARG_command"; if echo "$CMD" | grep -qiE "pipeline.*refresh|refresh.*pipeline|full-pipeline-refresh"; then if ! tasklist 2>/dev/null | grep -qi OneDrive; then echo "{\"decision\":\"block\",\"reason\":\"pre-pipeline-refresh: OneDrive process not running. Pipeline refresh requires OneDrive sync. Start OneDrive then retry.\"}"; exit 0; fi; if ! ping -n 1 -w 1500 8.8.8.8 >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo "{\"decision\":\"block\",\"reason\":\"pre-pipeline-refresh: Network unreachable. Pipeline refresh requires online access.\"}"; exit 0; fi; echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PreToolUse\",\"additionalContext\":\"pre-pipeline-refresh: OneDrive + network OK; proceeding.\"}}"; else echo "{}"; fi'

_comment: pre-dashboard-publish: runs freshness_enforcer.py before any publish/deploy command; blocks on FAIL (rc=2).

hooks.command: bash -c 'CMD="$CLAUDE_TOOL_ARG_command"; if echo "$CMD" | grep -qiE "\\bpublish\\b|\\bdeploy\\b|netlify deploy|netlify publish"; then ENF="C:/Users/ryan/OneDrive - EverPass Media/EVERPASS/EVERPASS TOOLS/Scripts/freshness_enforcer.py"; if [ -f "$ENF" ]; then python "$ENF" >/dev/null 2>&1; RC=$?; if [ "$RC" = "2" ]; then echo "{\"decision\":\"block\",\"reason\":\"pre-dashboard-publish: freshness_enforcer.py FAILED (rc=2). User-facing artifacts are stale (>12h). Refresh before publish or override interactively.\"}"; exit 0; fi; echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PreToolUse\",\"additionalContext\":\"pre-dashboard-publish: freshness_enforcer rc=$RC (0=PASS, 1=WARN); proceeding.\"}}"; else echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PreToolUse\",\"additionalContext\":\"pre-dashboard-publish: freshness_enforcer.py NOT FOUND at $ENF; proceeding without gate.\"}}"; fi; else echo "{}"; fi'

_comment: pre-external-share: blocks external-share-style commands when target path contains _archive/ or a DRAFT tag.

hooks.command: bash -c 'INPUT="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT"; if echo "$INPUT" | grep -qiE "(curl|scp|rsync|netlify deploy|netlify publish|gmail.send|drive share|firecrawl scrape|upload|attach)" && echo "$INPUT" | grep -qiE "(_archive/|/_archive |_archive\\\\|DRAFT[_ -]|_DRAFT_)"; then echo "{\"decision\":\"block\",\"reason\":\"pre-external-share: refusing to share/upload archived (_archive/) or DRAFT-tagged content. Confirm with Ryan before proceeding, or stage a clean (non-archive, non-draft) copy first.\"}"; else echo "{}"; fi'
